series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information regarding the records and affairs of each bank, trust department, or electronic data processing center assembled by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions examiners as provided under Ohio Revised Code Section 1125.10(A). These records also contain all correspondence related to these files.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed on the computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for twenty (20) years after the date of the examination, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years after the date of the examination, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
